title: Hungy Villager
description: Disables mobGriefing for Villagers and grass-eaters.
body:
_Do you hate creepers? If so, have you considered disabling mobGriefing, just to find your villager farm not working?_

In that case, this mod has the solution for you!

Hungy Villagers disables several features of disabled mobGriefing using three little mixins:

* Farmers can properly farm crops
* Villagers can properly pick up items
* Sheep and other animals can properly eat grass

That's pretty much all, enjoy!
